Use Python to inspect the evidence, refine that world model from the newest history, and search or score candidate actions or short sequences against the current goal as you currently understand it.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The RIGHT key moved something! The changed bbox is [19, 39, 22, 42] which is the right end of the horizontal bar. Let me look at what changed - the sky blue (S) block seems to have shifted. Let me compare before and after.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after the RIGHT action
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

ascii_before = before.ascii.split('\n')
ascii_after = after.ascii.split('\n')

print("Changed region (rows 17-23, cols 10-45):")
for i in range(17, 24):
    b = ascii_before[i][10:45]
    a = ascii_after[i][10:45]
    if b != a:
        print(f"  Row {i}: BEFORE: {b}")
        print(f"           AFTER:  {a}")
    else:
        print(f"  Row {i}: {b}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
